data.title: Jencap Unveils New Stop Loss Brand After Combining Operations
data.description: On July 1, 2026, International Assurance of Tennessee Inc. and Aran Insurance Underwriters disclosed their merger to form a new entity named Jencap A&H Insurance Solutions. The merging companies are notable stop loss managing underwriters. This collaboration aims to streamline their operations and offer consolidated services under the new brand.

data.title: NVIDIA boosts US AI manufacturing with $500B investment, creating 100K+ jobs in infrastructure.
data.description: In order to bolster U.S. manufacturing, NVIDIA is focusing on producing AI chips and investing $500 billion in infrastructure development, resulting in the creation of over 100,000 new jobs.

data.title: Helping Hand for Relief and Development Pledges $1 Million for Venezuela Earthquake Emergency Response
data.description: A donation of $1 million has been pledged by Helping Hand for Relief and Development (HHRD) to aid in emergency relief efforts after two severe earthquakes hit Venezuela on June 24, 2026. The tremors caused widespread destruction and left numerous...

data.title: In HelloNation, Home Health Expert Leslie Knopp Shares Guided Activity Plans for Healthy Aging at Home
data.description: In Traverse City, Michigan, on July 1, 2026 – an article tackles the benefits of utilizing everyday routines to aid elderly individuals in maintaining engagement, capability, and emotional balance while residing in their homes. This HelloNation piece emphasizes the efficacy of guided activity plans in providing structure and purpose to daily life for older adults.

data.title: Hyatt, HSL Properties and Desert Hospitality Management Announce Plans for Tucson's First Hyatt Regency Hotel
data.description: Hyatt Hotels Corporation (NYSE: H) has revealed plans for the launch of Hyatt Regency Tucson Convention Center in late 2027, in partnership with HSL Properties and Desert Hospitality Management. This upcoming property will be the inaugural Hyatt Regency establishment in Tucson, enhancing Hyatt's footprint in Southern Arizona. Situated centrally in downtown Tucson and close to the Tucson Convention Center, the hotel will offer convenient access to the bustling area.
Fed's Warsh: Fed will remain independent after the Supreme Court.

data.title: Waterloo Capital Acquires Equity Stake in Austin-Based Ironclad Wealth
data.description: Based in Austin, Texas, a merger is underway between two firms, resulting in the creation of a combined entity operating under the name Waterloo Capital. The move aims to solidify the presence of the firm, originating in Austin, Texas. Waterloo Capital, L.P., a registered investment adviser located in Austin, is on an upward trajectory as one of the rapidly expanding RIAs. This development comes into effect from July 1, 2026.
Fed's Warsh: Fed will continue to act on its remit after Cook ruling.

data.title: EVelution Energy Advances America's First Solar-Powered Commercial-Scale Cobalt Processing Facility with Start of Solar Construction
data.description: In Yuma, Arizona, EVelution Energy LLC has begun constructing a 28-megawatt (MW) solar facility to power its cobalt processing operations. The company is a critical minerals company in the U.S. and is establishing the first commercial-scale, solar-powered cobalt metal and cobalt sulfate processing facility in the nation. The project kicked off with the installation of the initial permanent steel mounting piles on the site in Yuma County.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures Rise On U.S.-Iran News; S&P 500 To Reclaim Key Level
data.description: The United States and Iran have allegedly reached a consensus to cease retaliatory strikes. Upcoming highlights include Tesla's sales performance and the release of the June job report. Dow Jones Futures are seeing an increase following the U.S.-Iran development, with the S&P 500 expected to surpass a significant threshold.

data.title: Maid Brigade Launches Summer Campaign Celebrating the Sounds of Not Cleaning
data.description: Families in SCOTTSDALE, Ariz., are utilizing online gift certificates to prioritize quality time during the summer. With the increase in vacations and weekend getaways, as well as gatherings with loved ones, Maid Brigade has introduced a new initiative. This aims to relieve families of mundane tasks to ensure they can enjoy these moments. The event commencing on July 1, 2026, highlights the significance of these online certificates. This initiative underscores the importance of reclaiming time, with families at the center, during the summer season.

data.title: Funds Managed by Blue Owl Capital Complete Acquisition of Sila Realty Trust
data.description: On July 1, 2026, Blue Owl Capital Inc. (NYSE: OWL), a prominent alternative asset manager, revealed the successful finalization of their acquisition of Sila Realty Trust, Inc. This transaction represents a significant milestone for Blue Owl and involves funds managed by the company.

data.title: Fibrosan Breaks Ground on New Manufacturing Facility in Cassopolis, Michigan
data.description: Fibrosan has officially started construction on a new manufacturing facility in CASSOPOLIS, Mich., on July 1, 2026. This initiative aims to boost local manufacturing, generate job opportunities, and enhance just-in-time production capabilities. The facility is also expected to support the expansion of Fibrosan's presence in North America. Overall, this development signals a significant investment in the area with the potential to create numerous new jobs and contribute to the strengthening of the local economy through increased manufacturing activities.
Fed's Warsh: I don't know if productivity has near-term policy impact.

data.title: IOTA (IOTA) in Q2 2026: Introduces Starfish upgrade and TWIN expansion, emphasizing trade digitization. Key achievements outlined.
data.description: In the second quarter of 2026, IOTA made significant progress with the introduction of the Starfish upgrade and the growth of TWIN. These advancements were accompanied by a strategic focus on digitalizing trade processes. The quarter saw a number of key technical milestones achieved, further solidifying IOTA's position in the market. For more detailed information, continue reading.

data.title: Euro weakens on lower inflation; Polymarket raises Fed hold probability to 79.5%, pushing euro below 1.14 mark.
data.description: Following the release of new inflation statistics in the euro zone indicating a decrease in prices, the euro continued to weaken, dropping below the 1.1400 mark.

data.title: Group 1 Automotive Continues Nationwide Brand Alignment with Group 1 Volkswagen Alamo Heights in Alamo Heights
data.description: One of the former Volkswagen locations in Alamo Heights is now operating under the unified Group 1 brand in ALAMO HEIGHTS, Texas. This move, occurring on July 1, 2026, is part of Group 1 Automotive, Inc.'s initiative to unify its dealer network across the nation. This effort aims to streamline operations and enhance the overall customer experience. The transition affects dealerships handling a substantial number of vehicles, with the goal of creating a more cohesive and efficient system.

data.title: Michael Schwartz to Chair NAMA Board of Directors
data.description: In Arlington, Virginia, the National Automatic Merchandising Association (NAMA) has appointed Michael Schwartz as the Chair of its Board of Directors for the term 2026-27. Schwartz, VP of Field and Account Sales (U.S.) and Equipment (U.S. & Canada) at Nestlé Professional Solutions, took over the position on July 1. Along with Schwartz, a new group of board officers and directors were also announced to support the association’s efforts for the convenience services sector. This marks a significant development in guiding the industry forward.
